expectations.evidence: Extremely detailed Phase 1 spec covering markdown parsing, syntax highlighting, layout, export, persistence, keyboard shortcuts, accessibility, visual design, animations, and empty state
'Full-viewport split: left 50% editor, right 50% preview, separated by a draggable splitter'
Detailed export section with Blob URL, filename slugification, and complete HTML5 document structure

11 review categories: XSS, operator precedence, null checks, function hoisting, template literal injection, keyboard nav, empty state, hardcoded colors, missing animations, scroll sync, line numbers, theme toggle
Fix via OpenCode prompts + rewrite sections (regex chain, export template, theme init, tab handler) + final additions (aria-live, tooltips, word count)
